title: Zero In Strip Blinds for Doors – Plastic Walk-Through Door Curtain Strips - Fly Door Curtain Strips for Insect Control - Fits Standard Doors - 90cm x 200cm
features: EFFECTIVE INSECT BARRIER – Protect your home from flying pests with the Zero In Strip Blinds for doors. These durable, lightweight plastic fly curtains effectively keep insects out while allowing fresh air to circulate in your home, creating a comfortable and pest-free environment

VERSATILE PROTECTION - Suitable for kitchens, patios and more, these walk-through plastic door strips fit standard doorways up to 90cm x 200cm and can be trimmed to size. They offer season-long protection, ensuring effective insect control for various spaces in your home

DURABLE & HYGIENIC – Made from resilient, wipe-clean plastic these poison-free fly curtains are designed to withstand daily use while ensuring easy maintenance. The easy-to-clean material ensures a hygienic and tidy environment, making it a perfect choice for busy households

SIMPLE INSTALLATION – Featuring a hang-bar with pre-drilled holes, installation is quick and easy, providing instant, hassle-free protection. These plastic blinds come in an assortment of colours, adding a decorative touch to your home. Available in single and double packs

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
description: From the manufacturer Fly Catcher Bait Refill Clothes Moths Killer Strip Blind for Doors Fly & Wasp Killer Wasp Nest Killer Foam Wasp Nest Killer Powder Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 21,209 4.2 out of 5 stars 5,068 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,786 4.1 out of 5 stars 4,168 4.0 out of 5 stars 4,558 4.3 out of 5 stars 3,698 Description Enjoy fly-free outdoor spaces with this effective fly attractant. Includes three 4g sachets for use with the Zero In Fly Max Fly Catcher - 2-Pack. The non-hazardous formula lures flies into the trap, keeping them away from you. Ensure comprehensive pest control, safeguarding your home’s textiles from various insect threats. Protect your investment in clothing, linens, and other fabrics with this single, easy-to-use moth spray that delivers powerful results. Our plastic strip blind effectively keeps flying insects at bay, ensuring a pest-free environment while still allowing fresh air to circulate in your home. Formulated with Tetramethrin and Prallethrin, this fly killer spray is designed to be effective while keeping odor levels low, making it perfect for use in living spaces without the strong, unpleasant smell that often comes with insect sprays. Effectively eliminates wasps in their nests from a safe distance of up to 2 metres, ensuring your protection from potential stings. The Wasp Nest Killer Powder quickly eliminates wasps at the source, offering a fast-acting solution to prevent further infestations. Its bottle allows precise application, and the easy-to-use puffer targets nests in cracks, holes, or entrances. Suitable for Outdoor Indoor Indoor Indoor & outdoor Indoor & outdoor Indoor & outdoor Format Trap Aerosol Door strips Spray Spray Powder Easy to Use Simply pour the solution into the trap and place in affected area. Simply spray on surfaces in wardrobes, drawers, and storage areas. Secure over any doorway. Spray insects directly from 60-90 cm away. To treat a room, close doors and windows, spray for 5 seconds per 30 m³, then leave for 10 minutes. Ventilate afterward. Simply spray it in the affected area and repeat the treatment if necessary. Simply apply the powder to the affected area and repeat if necessary.
